title: Hoolaroo Christmas Advent Cards
features: Pack of 24 Christmas Advent Cards 9cm x 6.5cm
Make your advent calendar extra special this year with this pack of 24 Christmas Activity Cards – perfect for filling your own DIY advent calendar.
You don’t need to use them all — simply pick your favourites and pop them into random days throughout your advent calendar for a delightful surprise.
